title: Sources: Alonso agrees to become Chelsea coach
summary: Xabi Alonso has agreed to become Chelsea's next head coach and will be confirmed within 24 hours, according to ESPN sources. The Spanish manager brings significant experience to Stamford Bridge.
content: Xabi Alonso is set to be confirmed as Chelsea head coach within the next 24 hours, sources have told ESPN, after agreeing to terms to take charge at Stamford Bridge.

zh.title: 消息人士：阿隆索同意成为切尔西主帅
zh.summary: 根据ESPN消息来源，哈维·阿隆索已同意成为切尔西的下一任主帅，并将在24小时内确认。这位西班牙主教练为斯坦福桥带来了丰富的执教经验。

title: Semenyo wins FA Cup for treble-chasing Man City
summary: Antoine Semenyo's second-half finish gave Manchester City a 1-0 FA Cup final victory over Chelsea at Wembley, keeping their domestic treble hopes alive. The win maintains City's pursuit of three major titles this season.
content: Manchester City kept alive their hopes of winning a domestic treble as Antoine Semenyo's sensational second-half finish broke Chelsea's resolve to settle the FA Cup final 1-0 at Wembley.

zh.title: 塞梅尼奥为追逐三冠的曼城赢得足总杯
zh.summary: 安东尼·塞梅尼奥在下半场的进球让曼城在温布利以1-0战胜切尔西，赢得足总杯冠军，保留了他们国内三冠的希望。这场胜利维持了曼城对本赛季三项主要荣誉的追求。

title: Salah: Liverpool must return to 'heavy metal' styl...
summary: Mohamed Salah criticized Liverpool's current style of play, calling for the club to return to their "heavy metal" brand of attacking football. The criticism suggests dissatisfaction with recent tactical approaches.
content: Mohamed Salah has hit out at Liverpool's style of play, saying the club need to rediscover their "heavy metal" brand of football.

zh.title: 萨拉赫：利物浦必须回归"重金属"踢法
zh.summary: 穆罕默德·萨拉赫批评了利物浦目前的比赛风格，呼吁球队回归他们"重金属"的进攻足球风格。这一批评表明他对最近战术方法的不满。

title: Sources: Carrick close to permanent Man Utd job
summary: Michael Carrick is close to securing a permanent head coach deal with Manchester United following negotiations with the club. The appointment represents a major managerial decision for the Red Devils.
content: Manchester United are close to an agreement with Michael Carrick to become the club's permanent head coach, sources have told ESPN.

zh.title: 消息来源：卡里克接近获得曼联主教练职位
zh.summary: 迈克尔·卡里克在与俱乐部谈判后即将与曼联达成永久主教练协议。这一任命对红魔队来说是一个重大的管理决定。

title: Celtic pip Hearts to Scottish title on final day
summary: Celtic secured their 14th Scottish Premiership title in 15 years with a final-day victory. The triumph denied Hearts their first league title since 1960.
content: Celtic have clinched their 14th Scottish Premiership title in 15 years, and denied Hearts their first since 1960.

zh.title: 凯尔特人队在最后一天击败哈茨队赢得苏超冠军
zh.summary: 凯尔特人队在最后一天的胜利中获得了他们15年来的第14个苏格兰超级联赛冠军。这次胜利使哈茨队自1960年以来首次无缘英超冠军。

title: Lewandowski to leave Barça at end of season
summary: Robert Lewandowski announced his departure from Barcelona at the end of the season when his contract expires. The move ends his tenure with the Spanish club.
content: Robert Lewandowski announced he will leave Barcelona at the end of the season when his contract expires.

zh.title: 莱万多夫斯基赛季末将离开巴萨
zh.summary: 罗伯特·莱万多夫斯基宣布将在赛季末合同到期时离开巴塞罗那。这一举动结束了他在西班牙俱乐部的职业生涯。

title: Arbeloa on Madrid 'number one' José: 'One of us'
summary: Real Madrid head coach Álvaro Arbeloa expressed enthusiasm about the possibility of José Mourinho returning to manage the club. Arbeloa described Mourinho as "one of us."
content: Real Madrid head coach Álvaro Arbeloa has said he would be "very happy" to see José Mourinho return to take charge of the club.

zh.title: 阿韦洛亚论马德里"一号"何塞:"我们中的一员"
zh.summary: 皇家马德里主教练阿尔瓦罗·阿韦洛亚对何塞·穆里尼奥重返俱乐部担任主教练的可能性表达了热情。阿韦洛亚将穆里尼奥描述为"我们中的一员"。

title: U.S. star Swanson available after maternity leave
summary: Mallory Swanson was activated by Chicago Red Stars ahead of Saturday's match against North Carolina Courage, making her first NWSL appearance since 2024 after returning from maternity leave. The return marks a significant moment for the U.S. star.
content: The Chicago Stars activated Mallory Swanson ahead of Saturday's match against the North Carolina Courage, positioning her to make her first NWSL appearance since 2024 after returning from maternity leave.

zh.title: 美国明星斯旺森产假后复出
zh.summary: 玛洛里·斯旺森在产假返回后被芝加哥红星队激活,将在周六对北卡罗来纳勇气队的比赛中首次亮相,这是她自2024年以来首次参加NWSL比赛。这次复出对这位美国明星来说是一个重要时刻。

title: 'Menacing and threatening atmosphere' forced Hearts exit
summary: Hearts claim a "menacing and threatening atmosphere" at Celtic Park forced them to leave the stadium immediately after their Scottish Premiership decider with Celtic. The incident highlights escalating tensions between the rival clubs.
content: Hearts say "the menacing and threatening atmosphere inside the stadium" forced them to leave Celtic Park immediately after the final whistle of their Scottish Premiership decider.

zh.title: "恐吓和威胁的气氛"迫使哈茨队离开凯尔特公园
zh.summary: 哈茨队声称凯尔特公园的"恐吓和威胁的气氛"迫使他们在与凯尔特队的苏格兰超级联赛决赛后立即离开球场。这一事件凸显了这两支对手之间日益升级的紧张局势。

title: Guardiola pays tribute to departing Silva and Stones
summary: Pep Guardiola paid tribute to departing Manchester City players Bernardo Silva and John Stones following the club's 1-0 FA Cup final victory over Chelsea. The tribute acknowledges the end of their time at the club.
content: Pep Guardiola pays tribute to departing players Bernardo Silva and John Stones following his side's 1-0 FA Cup final win over Chelsea at Wembley.

zh.title: 瓜帅向离队的席尔瓦和斯通斯致敬
zh.summary: 佩普·瓜迪奥拉在曼城1-0战胜切尔西赢得英足总杯决赛后，向即将离队的球员贝尔纳多·席尔瓦和约翰·斯通斯致敬。这一致敬标志着他们在俱乐部时代的结束。

title: 'They always deliver' - Man City savour 'magical' title
summary: Manchester City won the Women's Super League title for the first time in seven seasons, achieving a "magical" triumph. The victory marks a significant milestone for the women's team.
content: For the first time in seven seasons, the ribbons on the Women's Super League trophy are a different shade of blue after Manchester City's "magical" triumph.

zh.title: "他们总是交付成果" - 曼城女足享受"神奇"的冠军
zh.summary: 曼城女足在七个赛季以来首次赢得女超联赛冠军，取得了"神奇"的胜利。这次胜利标志着女队的一个重要里程碑。

title: Semenyo's stunner seals FA Cup for Man City; Chels...
summary: Antoine Semenyo's sublime back-heel finish secured the FA Cup for Manchester City against Chelsea, a finish worthy of deciding any cup final. The goal exemplified the quality of play in the match.
content: Antoine Semenyo's sublime back-heel finish was worthy of winning any cup final.

zh.title: 塞门约的精妙倒钩破门为曼城锁定英足总杯
zh.summary: 安托万·塞门约的精妙倒钩破门为曼城对阵切尔西的英足总杯比赛锁定了胜局，这个破门配得上在任何杯赛决赛中决出胜负。这个进球彰显了比赛中的高质量表现。

title: What Man City's FA Cup win means for Premier League places in Europe
summary: Manchester City's FA Cup victory affects European qualification places, with the top eight Premier League teams now guaranteed European competition and sixth place potentially earning Champions League football. The change has significant implications for multiple clubs.
content: The top eight in the Premier League will now qualify for Europe - and sixth could yet end up in the Champions League. Here's how.

zh.title: 曼城足总杯胜利对英超欧洲名额的意义
zh.summary: 曼城足总杯胜利影响欧洲资格名额,英超前八支球队现已获得欧洲赛事参赛权,第六名球队可能获得欧冠资格。这一变化对多支俱乐部有重要影响。

title: Chelsea closing in on appointing Alonso as next manager
summary: Chelsea are closing in on appointing Spanish manager Xabi Alonso as their next permanent head coach. The appointment represents a major managerial decision for the London club.
content: Chelsea are closing in on appointing Spaniard Xabi Alonso as the club's next permanent head coach.

zh.title: 切尔西接近宣布任命阿隆索为下一任主帅
zh.summary: 切尔西接近宣布任命西班牙籍主帅哈维·阿隆索为下一任常任主教练。这一任命对伦敦俱乐部来说是一个重大的管理决策。

title: Wolfsburg beat St Pauli to earn relegation play-off reprieve
summary: Wolfsburg's 3-1 away victory over St Pauli relegated the home side to Bundesliga 2, while Wolfsburg must now win a relegation play-off to avoid dropping down themselves. The result determines the fates of both clubs.
content: Wolfsburg earn a 3-1 away win over St Pauli to relegate the home side to Bundesliga 2, while the visitors must now win a relegation play-off to avoid dropping down to the German second division.

zh.title: 沃尔夫斯堡战胜圣保利获得降级附加赛的机会
zh.summary: 沃尔夫斯堡客场3:1战胜圣保利,导致圣保利降至德乙,而沃尔夫斯堡必须赢得降级附加赛才能避免自己降级。这一结果决定了两支球队的命运。

title: Arbeloa would be happy if Mourinho returns to Real
summary: Real Madrid head coach Alvaro Arbeloa expresses openness to Jose Mourinho potentially replacing him, suggesting the legendary manager could lead the club next season.
content: Real Madrid head coach Alvaro Arbeloa says he would be pleased if Jose Mourinho replaces him and leads the club next season.

zh.title: 如果穆里尼奥回归皇马，阿尔贝罗亚会很高兴
zh.summary: 皇马主教练阿尔贝罗亚表示对若泽·穆里尼奥可能取代他持开放态度，暗示这位传奇经理可能会在下赛季领导该俱乐部。

title: Man Utd reach agreement to appoint Carrick manager
summary: Manchester United has secured an agreement with Michael Carrick to serve as the club's permanent head coach.
content: Manchester United reach an agreement with Michael Carrick to become the club's permanent head coach.

zh.title: 曼联达成协议任命卡里克为主教练
zh.summary: 曼彻斯特联队已与迈克尔·卡里克达成协议，由他担任俱乐部的常任主教练。

title: Chopping trees and country music - how Paterson will prepare for Wembley
summary: Notts County manager Martin Paterson will use unconventional preparation methods, including tree chopping and country music, as his team readies for the League Two play-off final at Wembley.
content: Martin Paterson will be chopping trees and listing to country music as he begins preparations for Notts County's League Two play-off final at Wembley.

zh.title: 砍树和乡村音乐——帕特森如何为温布利做准备
zh.summary: 诺茨郡主教练马丁·帕特森将采用非常规的准备方法，包括砍树和乡村音乐，为他的球队参加温布利英乙联赛附加赛决赛做准备。

title: South Korea captain Son picked for fourth World Cup
summary: Former Tottenham Hotspur striker Son Heung-min will captain South Korea at his fourth FIFA World Cup this summer.
content: Former Tottenham Hotspur striker Son Heung-min will captain South Korea at his fourth World Cup this summer.

zh.title: 韩国队长孙兴慜入选第四届世界杯
zh.summary: 前热刺前锋孙兴慜将在今年夏天担任韩国队长参加第四届国际足联世界杯。

title: Football quiz: Name this season's top 10 WSL scorers
summary: BBC Sports presents a quiz challenge for fans to identify the top 10 goal scorers from this Women's Super League season as the final round of fixtures approaches.
content: The final round of Women's Super League fixtures takes place on Saturday and we're hoping for goals.

zh.title: 足球测验：说出本赛季WSL前10名射手
zh.summary: BBC体育为球迷呈现一个测验挑战，要求他们在女性超级联赛赛季最后一轮比赛临近时识别本赛季的前10名进球者。

title: Football quiz: Name every Scottish champion
summary: A BBC Sports quiz challenges fans to name every Scottish Premiership champion as the current season concludes on a decisive final day.
content: The Scottish Premiership will be decided on the final day and you can follow all the drama on the BBC Sport website and app.

zh.title: 足球测验：列出苏格兰所有冠军
zh.summary: BBC体育测验挑战球迷在当前赛季在决定性的最后一天结束时列出每个苏格兰超级联赛冠军。

title: Maeda reveals ambition to play in England - gossip
summary: Celtic midfielder Maeda reveals his ambition to play in England's Premier League while Rangers pursue two young players in ongoing transfer activity.
content: Celtic star opens up on dream move to Premier League as Rangers are linked with two teenagers...

zh.title: 马埃达透露英超梦想 - 转会传闻
zh.summary: 凯尔特人中场球员马埃达透露了在英超效力的雄心，同时流浪者队继续追求两名年轻球员。

title: The engineer missing his shift at Wembley... to play there instead
summary: Engineer Jay Lovell will fulfill a lifelong dream by playing in the FA Vase final at Wembley instead of working there, transforming an ordinary scheduled shift into an extraordinary athletic achievement.
content: Engineer Jay Lovell was set to be working at Wembley on Sunday, but instead he will be playing there in the FA Vase final.

zh.title: 工程师缺班温布利班次，改为在那里踢球
zh.summary: 工程师杰·洛维尔将通过在温布利参加足总杯决赛而非在那里工作来实现终身梦想，将一个普通班次转变为非凡的体育成就。

title: Three Lions - the football anthem that united a nation
summary: BBC Sport interviews Three Lions co-creator David Baddiel about the iconic football anthem and its role in uniting the nation. The song has become a defining part of English football culture.
content: BBC Sport speaks to Three Lions co-creator David Baddiel about the song which united a nation.

zh.title: 三狮军团——团结一个国家的足球颂歌
zh.summary: BBC体育采访了三狮军团联合创作者大卫·巴德尔，讨论这首标志性足球颂歌及其团结国家的作用。这首歌已成为英格兰足球文化的定义性部分。

title: How Doku became key player for treble-chasing Man City
summary: Jeremy Doku is set to be a pivotal player for Manchester City's treble bid as they face Chelsea in Saturday's FA Cup final. The winger's rise has made him essential to City's attacking play this season.
content: Jeremy Doku is likely to be a key player as Man City face Chelsea in Saturday's FA Cup final. BBC Sport looks at the winger's rise.

zh.title: 多库如何成为争夺三冠王曼城的关键球员
zh.summary: 杰里米·多库将成为曼城争夺三冠王的关键球员，因为他们在周六的足总杯决赛中面对切尔西。这位边锋的崛起使他成为曼城本赛季进攻的必要角色。

title: Would FA Cup win paper over the cracks for Chelsea?
summary: Chelsea faces an FA Cup final amid a turbulent season marked by two managerial changes and fan unrest. An FA Cup victory would provide significant momentum after a difficult campaign.
content: Chelsea have endured a difficult campaign after the departure of two managers and protests among the fanbase - so  what would an FA Cup win do for their season?

zh.title: 足总杯胜利能否掩盖切尔西的内部问题？
zh.summary: 切尔西在经历了两次主教练更换和球迷不满的动荡赛季后，面临足总杯决赛。足总杯胜利将在艰难赛季后为球队提供重大动力。
